Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x289D "AQUAPLANE-289D" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Aquaplane.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Made the following changes to allow the fire button in port 2 start the game, not just the space bar:
1. Patched the LDA $DC01 instruction at $2ED2 to be JSR $1100 instead 2. Added a small routine at $1100 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets $800D to $37 (which enables control with the joystick in port 2), the accumulator to $EF and returns, which causes the game to start just as if the space bar was pressed. If not pressed, the routine then executes the LDA $DC01 instruction to carry on the normal code flow.
